params.configId: Verification config id known by the hub
params.scopeSeed: Short string (<=31 bytes recommended). Used to compute the on-chain scope.

getRootBlockNumber(uint256).details: Returns the last block where the root is/was valid.      For the current root, returns block.number (still valid).      For historical roots, returns the block number when it was replaced (last valid block).      Returns 0 if the root has never been set or has been evicted from history.      The root history is maintained in a circular buffer (last 100 roots)

params.root: The census Merkle root to validate

returns.blockNumber: The last block where this root is/was valid (0 if invalid/evicted)

getTotalVotingPowerAtRoot(uint256).details: Returns 0 if the root has not been recorded, or if its total power is zero.      Pair with getRootBlockNumber(root) to disambiguate unknown roots.

returns.totalVotingPower: Total voting power at that root snapshot.

onVerificationSuccess(bytes,bytes).custom:flow: This function decodes the output and calls the customizable verification hook
onVerificationSuccess(bytes,bytes).custom:security: Only the authorized hub contract can call this function
onVerificationSuccess(bytes,bytes).details: Only callable by the identity verification hub V2 contract for security

params.output: The verification output data containing disclosed identity information
params.userData: The user-defined data passed through the verification process

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

scope().details: Public view function to access the current scope setting

returns._0: The scope value that proofs must match

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

verifySelfProof(bytes,bytes).custom:data-format: proofPayload = | 32 bytes attestationId | proofData |userContextData = | 32 bytes destChainId | 32 bytes userIdentifier | data |hubData = | 1 bytes contract version | 31 bytes buffer | 32 bytes scope | 32 bytes attestationId | proofData |
verifySelfProof(bytes,bytes).details: Parses relayer data format and validates against contract settings before calling hub V2

params.proofPayload: Packed data from relayer in format: | 32 bytes attestationId | proof data |
params.userContextData: User-defined data in format: | 32 bytes destChainId | 32 bytes userIdentifier | data |

getRootBlockNumber(uint256).notice: Validates a census root and returns the last block where it is/was valid

getTotalVotingPowerAtRoot(uint256).notice: Returns total voting power associated with a recorded census root.

nullifierUsed(uint256).notice: One-real-person-only: prevent multiple registrations even across different addresses and documents.

onVerificationSuccess(bytes,bytes).notice: Callback function called upon successful verification by the hub contract

verifySelfProof(bytes,bytes).notice: Verifies a self-proof using the bytes-based interface
